title: Evergy: A Growing Renewable Dynamo
text: Evergy is a renewable-focused utility operating in Missouri and Kansas. The company's recent results were quite solid, showing a 14% EPS growth rate over the prior-year quarter.

title: Evergy (EVRG) Files for Rate Hike in Missouri After 5 Years
text: Evergy (EVRG) files for a rate revision to the MPSC to recoup the expenses incurred in the past five years to upgrade the infrastructure.

title: High Yield Stock Watchlist - January 2022
text: There are 21 stocks on my high yield watchlist for January 2022. The majority of the stocks on my watchlist are currently undervalued based on dividend yield theory.
